title: FFI save_identity_to_file: non-atomic write corrupts keyfile on crash
description: save_identity_to_file uses fs::write() which is not atomic. If killed mid-write (OOM, SIGKILL), the identity file is left with partial content. On next launch, load_identity_from_file returns Err('identity file is N bytes, expected 64') and the app cannot recover. Fix: write to temp file then rename.
